summary: Tested 3 bug fixes for AgriBooks POS: (1) SaleDetailModal print with QR codes, (2) Modal action button overflow, (3) QuickSearch doc code integration. Backend all PASSED (9/9 tests). Frontend mostly PASSED with 1 minor issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Print Thermal (58mm) menu item exists in code (line 221-222) but NOT rendering in UI dropdown. Only 'Print Full Page' appears as first print option. SaleDetailModal works correctly.

details.note: Print Thermal code exists at PODetailModal.js line 221-222 but not rendering

details.input_placeholder: Search receipts, POs, or scan document code...

details.doc_code_query: Working - returns doc_code_match: true flag with correct document

action_items: INVESTIGATE: PODetailModal.js line 221-222 'Print Thermal (58mm)' DropdownMenuItem exists in code but NOT rendering in browser. Compare with SaleDetailModal.js which renders correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: PODetailModal.js and SaleDetailModal.js have identical dropdown structure but PO modal missing Print Thermal - possible React rendering issue or stale build cache

success_rate.frontend: 90% - All features work except PODetailModal missing Print Thermal menu item
